hero.question: Rolex Monte Carlo Masters: Francisco Cerundolo vs Tomas Machac
hero.prob_take: At 14.5%, the market has basically written off Cerundolo, pricing him as a 6-to-1 underdog despite Machac's well-documented issues with consistency and clay court form this season. Machac's recent results look better on paper than in reality, and Cerundolo's clay pedigree plus the tight odds on paper suggest there's 3-4 points of free value in the underdog here.

daily_take.headline: Cerundolo's odds cratered 53pts in 24hrs. The market knows something.
daily_take.deck: Cerundolo dropped from 31% to 14.5% on Polymarket in a single day, despite no injury news or late withdrawal rumors. The market is pricing in either a late lineup change, sharp money on Machac, or both. At 14.5%, Cerundolo is oversold if he's actually healthy and playing. Worth a small contrarian look if you can confirm he's in the draw.
